content: هَيَحاوِل يَصَلَّح الكاميرا بَدَل مَا يِبَعْهَا
translations: eng:he will try to fix the camera instead of selling it

transcriptions.arabizi: hayihaewil yisallah ilkameera badal ma yibaA|ha
